nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿馬帕州
nodes.summary: 阿馬帕州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括白尾金喉蜂鸟、绿尾金喉蜂鸟、暗色髭喉蜂鸟等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 圭亚那 (地区)
nodes.summary: 圭亚那 (地区)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联92种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、Black curassow、纯色秧鸡等92种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Dusky antbird
nodes.summary: Dusky antbird（Dusky antbird，学名 Cercomacroides tyrannina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: saturatior: from southern and eastern Bolívar in Venezuela east through the Guianas and northeastern Brazil north of the Amazon to the Atlantic in Amapá The dusky antbird inhabits the understorey of evergreen forest, where it overwhelmingly favors the forest edges and clearings and the edges of watercourses

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: saturatior: from southern and eastern Bolívar in Venezuela east through the Guianas and northeastern Brazil north of the Amazon to the Atlantic in Amapá The dusky antbird inhabits the understorey of evergreen forest, where it overwhelmingly favors the forest edges and clearings and the edges of watercourses

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: saturatior: from southern and eastern Bolívar in Venezuela east through the Guianas and northeastern Brazil north of the Amazon to the Atlantic in Amapá The dusky antbird inhabits the understorey of evergreen forest, where it overwhelmingly favors the forest edges and clearings and the edges of watercourses

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in secondary forest but only that bordering taller forest and having a dense understorey
